ComplianceTrack
🏠Dashboard✅Compliance🏢Departments👥Users🤖AI Library⚙️Settings
ComplianceTrack

Admin Panel

UsersOrg SettingsRolesDepartments

Roles define what actions users can perform. Assign roles via the Users tab.

RoleDescription
Account Adminaccount_adminFull control over the organisation. Manage users, departments, compliance, API tokens, webhooks, and settings.
Department Adminclient_department_adminManage users and departments within their scope. Full compliance workflow control including status changes and reassignment.
EditoreditorCreate and edit compliance items and documents. Can add comments. Cannot change status or manage users.
ViewerviewerRead-only access to compliance items, documents, audit logs, and comments. Cannot create or modify anything.
